description_long: This object consists of four cylindrical lotion bottles, each with a different pastel-colored cap: green, blue, beige, and pink. The bottles are made of white plastic and feature printed labels with both text and colored graphics, including brand and product information. The caps are translucent and appear to be snap-on style, covering a spray dispenser mechanism. The labels wrap around the bottles and include barcodes, ingredient lists, and product names in bold, colorful fonts. The overall design is clean and modern, with each bottle distinguished by its cap color and label accent. These bottles are typically found in personal care settings but could also be seen discarded or used in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or garages.
description: A set of four cylindrical lotion bottles with pastel-colored snap-on caps and printed labels, each featuring a spray dispenser.
description_view_0: Front view showing the colored caps and main product labels with brand and product names clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the barcodes, ingredient lists, and the translucent nature of the caps.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full ingredient and information labels, with the colored caps visible from above.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the side labels, cap colors, and the cylindrical shape of the bottles.
